title: Attraction & Experience
description: Tourist attraction or bookable travel experience listing from an OTA or attraction platform.

name.description: Name of the attraction or experience. Commonly found in: Viator, GetYourGuide, TripAdvisor Experiences, attraction website.

attraction_type.description: Category of the attraction or experience. Commonly found in: platform category, listing metadata.

operator_name.description: Name of the operator or organizer. Commonly found in: Viator operator, GetYourGuide supplier, listing details.

address.description: Meeting point or address. Commonly found in: listing details, meeting point section.

city.description: City where the experience takes place. Commonly found in: listing details, platform search.

country.description: Country where the experience takes place. Commonly found in: listing details, platform search.

latitude.description: Latitude of the meeting point or main location. Commonly found in: Google Maps, geocoding API.

longitude.description: Longitude of the meeting point or main location. Commonly found in: Google Maps, geocoding API.

description.description: Full description of the experience. Commonly found in: listing description, about section.

duration_minutes.description: Duration of the experience in minutes. Commonly found in: listing details, duration field.

min_participants.description: Minimum number of participants. Commonly found in: listing details, booking requirements.

max_participants.description: Maximum number of participants. Commonly found in: listing details, group size.

age_minimum.description: Minimum age requirement. Commonly found in: listing details, requirements section.

price_adult_usd.description: Adult price in USD. Commonly found in: Viator pricing, GetYourGuide pricing, listing price.

price_child_usd.description: Child price in USD. Commonly found in: listing price, pricing table.

price_currency.description: Currency code for the prices. Commonly found in: listing price display.

booking_required.description: Whether advance booking is required. Commonly found in: listing details, booking info.

cancellation_policy.description: Cancellation policy description. Commonly found in: listing policies, booking terms.

languages_offered.description: Languages in which the experience is offered. Commonly found in: listing details, language filter.

inclusions.description: What is included in the experience. Commonly found in: listing inclusions section.

exclusions.description: What is not included in the experience. Commonly found in: listing exclusions section.

review_rating.description: Average review rating. Commonly found in: Viator rating, GetYourGuide rating, TripAdvisor rating.

review_count.description: Total number of reviews. Commonly found in: Viator, GetYourGuide, TripAdvisor.

images.description: URLs of experience images. Commonly found in: listing photos.

category_tags.description: Category tags or labels. Commonly found in: platform tags, listing metadata.

booking_url.description: URL to book the experience. Commonly found in: listing page CTA, booking link.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
